---
name: Bug report
about: Create a report to help us fix an issue in CorePulse
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

**Describe the bug**
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

**Steps to Reproduce**
Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '....'
3. See error

**Expected behavior**
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

**Environment Information:**
- WordPress Version: [e.g. 6.5]
- CorePulse Version: [e.g. 1.0.0]
- Browser & OS: [e.g. Chrome on Windows]
- Active Page Builder (if any): [e.g. Elementor, Gutenberg]

**Screenshots or Console Errors**
If applicable, add screenshots or paste browser console errors here to help explain your problem.
